summary: Commission Bug Fix VERIFIED. Tested vendor_commission_base_amount and vendor_commission_base_currency now correctly store values in base/payment currency (e.g., INR) instead of USD. All 10 backend tests passed. Frontend verified displaying commission in base currency (e.g., '168 INR' not '168 USD') in VendorDashboard Assigned Transactions and Other Transactions tables.
passed_tests: I&E creation: vendor_commission_base_amount=20 (2% of 1000 INR), vendor_commission_base_currency='INR', vendor_commission_amount=0.2 USD
I&E creation with various amounts: 100 USD/8400 INR → 168 INR commission, 50 USD/4200 INR → 84 INR commission
Transaction (withdrawal) creation: vendor_commission_base_amount=168 (2% of 8400 INR), vendor_commission_base_currency='INR'
Cash transaction: Uses 4% rate, vendor_commission_base_amount=336 (4% of 8400 INR)
/api/vendor/transactions returns vendor_commission_base_amount and vendor_commission_base_currency fields correctly
/api/vendor/income-expenses returns vendor_commission_base_amount and vendor_commission_base_currency fields correctly
UI: VendorDashboard 'Assigned Transactions' COMMISSION column shows '168 INR', '128 INR' (base currency, NOT USD)
UI: VendorDashboard 'Other Transactions' COMMISSION column shows '1.6 INR' for loans
UI: Settlement Balance shows commission in both USD ($2.6) and INR (188.4 INR)
critical_code_review_comments: Bug fix correctly applied in 4 endpoints: I&E creation (lines 6786-6793), I&E vendor approval (lines 7154-7172), Transaction creation (lines 5634-5640), Transaction vendor approval (lines 4755-4769)
Frontend VendorDashboard.js correctly displays vendor_commission_base_amount with vendor_commission_base_currency (lines 1035-1042, 1174-1180, 1217-1223)
Frontend Vendors.js correctly displays vendor_commission_base_amount with vendor_commission_base_currency (lines 1076-1083, 1220-1226)
Settlement calculation logic in server.py (lines 3860-3940) correctly aggregates commission_base and commission_usd by currency
seed_data_creation: Created test I&E entries and withdrawal transactions with INR base currency during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Commission bug fix fully verified. Key verification: Create I&E/transaction with base_currency=INR, base_amount=1000 (for 10 USD). Commission should be calculated on base_amount (20 INR = 2% of 1000), not USD amount (0.2 USD = 2% of 10). Frontend shows commission in base currency format (e.g., '168 INR').

bug_fix_verification.issue: vendor_commission_base_amount and vendor_commission_base_currency were storing USD values instead of actual base/payment currency values
bug_fix_verification.example_before_fix: 10 USD expense (base: 1000 INR) with 2% commission → vendor_commission_base_amount=0.2, vendor_commission_base_currency='USD'
bug_fix_verification.example_after_fix: 10 USD expense (base: 1000 INR) with 2% commission → vendor_commission_base_amount=20.0, vendor_commission_base_currency='INR'
bug_fix_verification.verification_status: PASSED - Both backend API and frontend display correctly show commission in base currency
